steps.title: Attack the sole-cause claim
steps.content: The conclusion says cataract frequency is solely due to variation in Aasdh expression. To weaken that claim, the finding must show that different expression levels do not reliably produce different cataract outcomes.

steps.title: Reject supporting evidence
steps.content: Choice B makes the gene's effect more isolated, not weaker. Choice C only shows expression levels vary in nature. Choice D strengthens the experiment by making the knockout and wild-type mice otherwise identical. The answer is A.
